title: block archive growth without pre-reserved budget
rawUserRequest: 以后遇到 CI/PR/发布门禁阻断，只要判断流程可以改善，就停止发布，优先改善流程；预算上限不足也必须在事前检查中拦截。

declaredIntent.summary: 让 Work Item 归档前计算归档后 archiveGrowth，并要求 Contract 在同一工单中显式声明预期值；缺失或超限时 fail closed。

outOfScope: Starting or reordering planned Work Items

sources.reason: Archive boundary where projected growth must be checked before mutation.
Regression evidence for missing and valid archive reservations.
Generate projected archive-growth evidence at Work Item start.
Generate projected archive-growth evidence for adopter bootstrap.
Migrate finish lifecycle fixtures to explicit archive reservations.
Migrate governance journey fixtures to explicit archive reservations.
Migrate archive fixtures to explicit archive reservations.
Bounded reservation for this corrective Work Item archive.

riskAssessment.reason: Fail-closed validation is added at archive mutation boundary with focused regression tests.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root-cause process correction before release continuation.

preReviewWarnings: Verify archive mutation is never performed before projected budget validation.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Archive growth is projected before mutation and fails closed without an explicit same-Work-Item reservation.
Focused regression tests cover missing, stale, and valid archive-growth reservations.
The full Contract/Preflight/PR/merge/ai-close-work-item lifecycle passes without starting or reordering planned Work Items.
guidelines: Governance budget gates fail closed before irreversible archive mutation.
Budget reservations are explicit, bounded, and tied to the current Work Item.
Formatting and budget checks pass before PR.

intent.problem: ai-finish can archive a Work Item and only then reveal that archiveGrowth exceeds the configured ceiling, forcing late process repair.
constraints: Do not change release publication workflow logic.
Keep archive mutation atomic and rollback-safe.
intent.rationale: The irreversible step must validate its projected complexity cost before moving files, so budget failures cannot occur after archive mutation.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized root-cause process corrections when CI/PR/release gates expose workflow defects.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
